title: benAplaysGames's texture pack
description: A 16x PvP texture pack with a unique yellow and duck-themed style. Features low fire, small shield, no explosion particles, and clean custom items made for fast-paced PvP like Mace and Vanilla (cpvp) Fun, bright, and competitive.
body:
"benA's Pack is a vibrant 16x PvP texture pack created by benAplaysgames, designed specifically for modern PvP game modes like Mace, Vanilla and SMP. This pack features custom-designed items with a unique yellow and duck-themed aesthetic, giving it a fun and playful style while staying competitive.

With low fire, a reduced shield size, and simplified visuals, and no explosion particles, this pack ensures better visibility and cleaner combat. From custom swords and armor to golden apples and potions, every texture has been carefully made to match the bright yellow theme. Perfect for players who want a fun yet optimized PvP experience.
